items.title: Relative of Pakistan Deputy PM Ishaq Dar arrested in alleged gangrape of two foreigners
items.summary: The suspects, identified as Muhammad Raza Dar, Hassan Raza, Sikandar Khan and Sajid Ali, were sent to five-day police remand by a Lahore court.

items.title: Cape Verde's historic World Cup ride ends after pushing Argentina to the brink
items.summary: Cape Verde didn't win a match at the World Cup, and somehow, that didn't seem to matter. The African team's debut on this stage was unforgettable.
